text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Oh... So that's Air Shakur...

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Uh, she looks pretty scary. You should probably
tone it down...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just like at the academy, other people seem to
find Air Shakur a bit of an outsider. Even so...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that's exactly why I can't help but wonder
something. There's no doubt that Air Shakur is
one of the top talents in her generation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So why is Parcae predicting that she won't be able
to win? It's almost as if they're putting her
through a trial.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur has been occupied with her laptop
ever since we returned to the academy, feeding
Parcae the data from the race.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
It's within the margin of error. As I thought,
Parcae's accuracy is impeccable.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Although...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: It's nothing...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: It's just my heart rate was higher than expected.
choice_data_list: Maybe because you were having fun.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Don't make it weird. Excitement levels can be
calculated.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Emotion is an unstable variable, however, so it's
inefficient to convert into data.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Well, isn't it? I'd have to figure out how to
reliably quantify emotions, compile the data, and
then verify it. It'd take way too long.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
On top of that, the conditions are way too
limited, so the resulting data would be practically
useless. Inefficient as hell.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
That's why I classify the emotional data into
categories and compress whatever can't be
categorized. That keeps the data integrity as high
as possible.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I probably ought to grab some fresh data of me
running with an increased heart rate.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
In any case, I've figured it out now. Problem
solved.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Now, about our next goal... Parcae is predicting
that I'll get on the scoreboard in the Hopeful
Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Hopeful Stakes is a high-stakes junior G1
race. Those who perform well attract a lot of
interest and attention from the fans for their
classic year.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
From here on out, it's just a matter of increasing
my stats to the values I need to become a Double
Crown champion.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
This could be the key to narrowing that
seven-centimeter gap.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suddenly realize something. If Shakur will be
seven centimeters behind, that means someone
else will be seven ahead. But who?
choice_data_list:
Who's on the other side of your
seven-centimeter gap?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Beats me.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
No matter how much data I input, I can only ever
catch a glimpse of them.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
If I knew who it was, my calculations would be so
much easier.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
The only thing I can confirm is that I lose to
someone by a margin of seven centimeters. That's
it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I need to gather more data before the
Hopeful Stakes.
